remarks: VERIFIED. Radix Primitives 기반 Overlay/Container 8종. z-index: Toast(100) > Dialog(80) > Drawer(70) > Tooltip(60) > Popover(50). 모든 컴포넌트 S7FE1 Semantic 토큰만 사용, 하드코딩 0건. Motion: tailwindcss-animate 유틸리티 + motion-reduce 대응. a11y: Radix 내장 focus trap/ESC/keyboard nav. 설치 명령: npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-toast @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-popover @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-accordion && npm install -D tailwindcss-animate
